probe: six short Mistral-instruct prompts at max_tokens=5 against llama.cpp
known_blocker: Count to three. diverges at generated step 2: Camelid chooses dot then Sure, while llama.cpp full decode chooses comma then 2. Previous step-logit evidence shows this is a near-tie and fresh llama.cpp forced-prefill after the same prefix also prefers dot.
support_boundary: bounded backend exact-row MoE runtime evidence only; no broad Mixtral, frontend, long-context, production, neighboring-row, or full-support claim
